name: pen-agent
description: Automated penetration testing agent framework using opencode

scripts.check: node --check src/env-loader.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/agent-loop.js && node --check src/runner.js && node --check src/supervisor.js && node --check src/whiteboard.js && node --check src/flag-counter.js && node --check src/flag-store.js && node --check src/skill-router.js && node --check src/stream-flag-scanner.js && node --check src/vulnerability-playbooks.js && node --check dashboard/server.js && node --check dashboard/server/archives.js && node --check dashboard/server/fs-utils.js && node --check dashboard/server/http.js && node --check dashboard/server/path-utils.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run dashboard:build
